-
-  Widget _buildViewMode(BoxConstraints constraints, List<dynamic> displayedApps) {
-    if (displayedApps.isEmpty) {
-      return Center(child: Text(tr('No apps found')));
-    }
-    switch (_viewMode) {
-      case 'row':
-        return _buildRowView(displayedApps);
-      case 'carousel':
-        return _buildCarouselView(constraints, displayedApps);
-      case 'masterDetail':
-        return _buildMasterDetailView(constraints, displayedApps);
-      case 'box':
-      default:
-        return _buildBoxView(constraints, displayedApps);
-    }
-  }
-
-  Widget _buildBoxView(BoxConstraints constraints, List<dynamic> displayedApps) {
-    int crossAxisCount = constraints.maxWidth > 1200
-        ? 5
-        : constraints.maxWidth > 800
-            ? 4
-            : 2;
-
-    return GridView.builder(
-      padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 24, vertical: 24),
-      gridDelegate: SliverGridDelegateWithFixedCrossAxisCount(
-        crossAxisCount: crossAxisCount,
-        childAspectRatio: 0.75, // Taller covers
-        crossAxisSpacing: 24,
-        mainAxisSpacing: 24,
-      ),
-      itemCount: displayedApps.length,
-      itemBuilder: (context, index) {
-        return AppCard(app: displayedApps[index], apiUrl: _apiUrl);
-      },
-    );
-  }
-
-  Widget _buildRowView(List<dynamic> displayedApps) {
-    return ListView.separated(
-      padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 24, vertical: 24),
-      itemCount: displayedApps.length,
-      separatorBuilder: (context, index) => SizedBox(height: 16),
-      itemBuilder: (context, index) {
-        // AppCard needs height constraints when in a ListView
-        return SizedBox(
-          height: 140, // Fixed height for row items
-          child: Row(
-            crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
-            children: [
-              // Use AppCard but constrained to be square-ish
-              SizedBox(
-                width: 140,
-                child: AppCard(app: displayedApps[index], apiUrl: _apiUrl),
-              ),
-              SizedBox(width: 16),
-              Expanded(
-                child: Card(
-                  clipBehavior: Clip.antiAlias,
-                  shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16)),
-                  child: Padding(
-                    padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16.0),
-                    child: Column(
-                      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
-                      children: [
-                        Text(
-                          displayedApps[index]['name'] ?? 'Unknown',
-                          style: TextStyle(fontSize: 18, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold),
-                          maxLines: 1,
-                          overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
-                        ),
-                        SizedBox(height: 8),
-                        Text(
-                          displayedApps[index]['versioncode']?.toString() ?? '',
-                          style: TextStyle(color: Colors.grey, fontSize: 14),
-                        ),
-                        Spacer(),
-                        if (displayedApps[index]['description'] != null)
-                          Text(
-                            displayedApps[index]['description'],
-                            maxLines: 2,
-                            overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
-                          ),
-                      ],
-                    ),
-                  ),
-                ),
-              ),
-            ],
-          ),
-        );
-      },
-    );
-  }
-
-  Widget _buildCarouselView(BoxConstraints constraints, List<dynamic> displayedApps) {
-    // Determine how many items to show fully
-    double viewportFraction = constraints.maxWidth > 1200 ? 0.2 : (constraints.maxWidth > 800 ? 0.3 : 0.6);
-    
-    return Center(
-      child: SizedBox(
-        height: constraints.maxHeight * 0.6, // Take 60% of vertical space
-        child: PageView.builder(
-          controller: PageController(viewportFraction: viewportFraction),
-          itemCount: displayedApps.length,
-          itemBuilder: (context, index) {
-            return Padding(
-              padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12.0),
-              child: AppCard(app: displayedApps[index], apiUrl: _apiUrl),
-            );
-          },
-        ),
-      ),
-    );
-  }
-
-  Widget _buildMasterDetailView(BoxConstraints constraints, List<dynamic> displayedApps) {
-    if (_selectedMasterDetailIndex >= displayedApps.length) {
-      _selectedMasterDetailIndex = 0;
-    }
-    final selectedApp = displayedApps[_selectedMasterDetailIndex];
-
-    return Row(
-      children: [
-        // Master List (Left side)
-        SizedBox(
-          width: constraints.maxWidth * 0.35, // 35% width for master list
-          child: ListView.separated(
-            padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
-            itemCount: displayedApps.length,
-            separatorBuilder: (context, index) => SizedBox(height: 8),
-            itemBuilder: (context, index) {
-              final app = displayedApps[index];
-              final isSelected = index == _selectedMasterDetailIndex;
-              return ListTile(
-                selected: isSelected,
-                selectedTileColor: Theme.of(context).primaryColor.withAlpha(25), // roughly 0.1 opacity
-                shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12)),
-                leading: ClipRRect(
-                  borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),
-                  child: app['image'] != null
-                      ? Image.network(
-                          '$_apiUrl/files/image?path=${Uri.encodeComponent(app['image'])}',
-                          width: 48,
-                          height: 48,
-                          fit: BoxFit.cover,
-                          errorBuilder: (ctx, err, stack) => Container(
-                            width: 48,
-                            height: 48,
-                            color: Colors.grey.withAlpha(51),
-                            child: Icon(Icons.videogame_asset),
-                          ),
-                        )
-                      : Container(
-                          width: 48,
-                          height: 48,
-                          color: Colors.grey.withAlpha(51),
-                          child: Icon(Icons.videogame_asset),
-                        ),
-                ),
-                title: Text(
-                  app['name'] ?? 'Unknown',
-                  maxLines: 1,
-                  overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
-                  style: TextStyle(fontWeight: isSelected ? FontWeight.bold : FontWeight.normal),
-                ),
-                subtitle: Text(
-                  app['versioncode']?.toString() ?? '',
-                  maxLines: 1,
-                ),
-                onTap: () {
-                  setState(() {
-                    _selectedMasterDetailIndex = index;
-                  });
-                },
-              );
-            },
-          ),
-        ),
-        VerticalDivider(width: 1),
-        // Detail View (Right side)
-        Expanded(
-          child: Padding(
-            padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24.0),
-            child: Row(
-              crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
-              children: [
-                SizedBox(
-                  width: 300,
-                  height: 400,
-                  child: AppCard(app: selectedApp, apiUrl: _apiUrl),
-                ),
-                SizedBox(width: 32),
-                Expanded(
-                  child: SingleChildScrollView(
-                    child: Column(
-                      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
-                      children: [
-                        Text(
-                          selectedApp['name'] ?? 'Unknown',
-                          style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineMedium?.copyWith(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold),
-                        ),
-                        SizedBox(height: 16),
-                        if (selectedApp['category'] != null || selectedApp['categories'] != null)
-                          Chip(label: Text(selectedApp['category'] ?? selectedApp['categories'] ?? '')),
-                        SizedBox(height: 16),
-                        Text(
-                          tr('Version: ') + (selectedApp['versioncode']?.toString() ?? 'N/A'),
-                          style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleMedium,
-                        ),
-                        SizedBox(height: 16),
-                        Text(
-                          selectedApp['description'] ?? tr('No description available.'),
-                          style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.bodyLarge?.copyWith(height: 1.5),
-                        ),
-                      ],
-                    ),
-                  ),
-                )
-              ],
-            ),
-          ),
-        ),
-      ],
-    );
-  }
 }
